description: Create a recurring Sales Order in Vtiger CRM for 'Global Trade Corp' to automate monthly subscription billing. The Sales Order must have the subject '2025 Printer Lease Contract - Global Trade Corp' and a status of 'Approved'. Configure the recurring invoice schedule with a 'Monthly' frequency, starting '2025-01-01' and ending '2025-12-31', with a 'Net 30' payment duration and 'Created' invoice status. Include a service line item for 'Enterprise Printer Lease & Maintenance' with a quantity of 1 and a list price of 450.00. Ensure the billing and shipping addresses are populated from the organization record.

metadata.expected_subject: 2025 Printer Lease Contract - Global Trade Corp
